is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person cannot prove Belgian nationality.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is not an EU citizen and not a person covered by EU free movement law.

in_illegal_residence.name: in_illegal_residence
in_illegal_residence.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting or no longer meeting the conditions for access or residence.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for processing an international protection request.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed to assess the risk of absconding.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not submit an international protection request within the legally prescribed period.

used_false_information_or_documents.name: used_false_information_or_documents
used_false_information_or_documents.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or pushback.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement or supervision of regulations on access, residence, establishment, and removal of foreigners.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.description: The person has declared unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

subject_to_active_entry_ban.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
subject_to_active_entry_ban.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in Belgium and/or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

filed_new_application_immediately_after_.name: filed_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
filed_new_application_immediately_after_.description: The person filed a new residence application or new international protection request immediately after being subject to a refusal of entry or residence, a decision ending their stay, or a pushback or removal measure.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had already given fingerprints in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the responsible state for processing an international protection request.

multiple_applications_with_negative_outc.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
multiple_applications_with_negative_outc.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in Belgium or other member states that resulted in negative decisions or did not lead to a residence permit.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the responsible state.

entered_for_purposes_other_than_stated_a.name: entered_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
entered_for_purposes_other_than_stated_a.description: The person declared or their file shows that they came to Belgium for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection request or residence application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unfounded.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unfounded.description: The person is subject to a fine because they filed a manifestly unlawful appeal with the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The person qualifies as an identified foreigner: holds a valid travel document, passport, or identity document; or is recognised as a national by their country's authority willing to issue a laissez-passer; or falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer.

holds_valid_travel_document.name: holds_valid_travel_document
holds_valid_travel_document.description: The person holds a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_by_national_authority_with_la.name: recognised_by_national_authority_with_laissez_passer
recognised_by_national_authority_with_la.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

nationality_eligible_for_ministerial_lai.name: nationality_eligible_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
nationality_eligible_for_ministerial_lai.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective criteria listed in paragraph 2 for establishing risk of absconding is met for the person.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: There is a risk of absconding for the person as defined in paragraph 1(11): reasons exist to believe the person will abscond, established after individual examination on the basis of one or more objective criteria.
